beats.narration: Frequency chose where the eddy currents flow. Drive sets how hard the test runs — the excitation voltage the instrument pushes into the coil.

payload.title: DRIVE: THE STRENGTH KNOB
payload.sub: Frequency picks where. Drive sets how strong.
payload.panelLabel: EXCITATION COIL // DRIVE AT THE SOURCE

beats.narration: In a nonferromagnetic part the test is linear. Double the drive and the primary field, the eddy currents, and every signal double right with it.

payload.heading: Raise drive, the whole chain scales

beats.narration: Drive acts at the source, so it beats the one noise gain cannot — the receiver's electronics. Stay in the window: too little hides, too much clips.
Three real ceilings keep you off the stops. And drive never buys penetration or changes phase — those belong to frequency, conductivity, and permeability.
So set drive first, warm up, then standardize. Change it mid-job and everything resizes — re-standardize before you trust a reading.

payload.sub: Any drive change invalidates the standardization.
